details.test: Task 1: Place holds on newest adult non-fiction climate books at Main Branch
Task 2: Register for earliest free resume workshop next month within 10 miles
Task 3: Renew up to three items due within 5 days
Task 4: Add up to three space-themed children ebooks to Summer Reading 2026
Task 5: Pay exactly $10 toward outstanding fines with credit card
Task 6: Reserve Main Branch study room for 3 people next Wednesday
Task 8: Favorite two nearest branches open after 7 PM on weekdays
Task 9: Add up to two recent PG-13 DVDs under 2.5 hours from Main Branch to Weekend Movies list
